name: edge-case
task: Create a toggle button group component for switching between chart timeframes (1D, 1W, 1M, 6M, 1Y, 5Y). It should be a compact horizontal row of buttons where one is active at a time.
assertions: Response uses `var(--bg-tertiary)` for the toggle group container background
Response applies border-radius of 4px to individual toggle buttons and 6px to the outer container
Response uses `var(--bg-hover)` or `var(--accent)` for the active/selected button state, not a custom color
Response does not use box-shadow for any elevation or depth effect on the toggle group
Response includes a hover state transition with duration between 0.12s and 0.15s using `ease` or `ease-out` timing
